name: Workflow Inventory to Google Drive
description: Lists all One CLI flow files from the local flows directory, uses Claude AI to summarize and categorize each workflow, and saves a structured inventory report as a file to Google Drive. Adapted from n8n's backup-all-workflows-to-Google-Drive workflow.

source.originalName: Backup all n8n workflows to Google Drive every 4 hours

googleDriveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for uploading the inventory

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting notification

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the inventory notification

flowsDirectory.description: Path to the One CLI flows directory (defaults to .one/flows/)

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to save the inventory (optional — saves to root if omitted)

steps.name: List all One CLI flow files

bash.command: ls -la ~/.one/flows/*.flow.json 2>/dev/null; echo '---SEPARATOR---'; for f in ~/.one/flows/*.flow.json; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open('$f')); print(json.dumps({'file':sys.argv[1],'key':d.get('key',''),'name':d.get('name',''),'description':d.get('description','')[:200],'version':d.get('version',''),'source':d.get('source',{}),'stepCount':len(d.get('steps',[])),'inputCount':len(d.get('inputs',{}))},ensure_ascii=False))" "$(basename $f)" 2>/dev/null; fi; done

steps.name: Parse flow listing into structured data
Build Claude prompt for inventory categorization
Build inventory report content for Drive upload
Save inventory report to temp file
Build Slack Block Kit inventory notification
